chain.thought: Explanation: Count the entries with a 1980 listing date: Durham Historic District (May 31, 1980); Free Will Baptist Church (Nov 13, 1980); William Hale House (Nov 18, 1980); Milton Town House (Nov 26, 1980); New Durham Meetinghouse and Pound (Dec 8, 1980); New Durham Town Hall (Nov 13, 1980); Michael Reade House (Feb 12, 1980); Religious Society of Friends Meetinghouse (Feb 29, 1980); Salmon Falls Mill Historic District (Feb 29, 1980); Sawyer Building (May 23, 1980); Woodman Institute (Jul 24, 1980). That makes 11 sites.
